---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Remallow
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node -v`)
- **Package manager**: (npm / yarn / pnpm)
- **Remallow version**: (run `remallow --test` or check `npm list -g remallow`)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other information about the problem.
